CustomMetadata.label: AA-002 - Apex trigger declared without sharing

values.value: One or more Apex triggers declare without sharing. Triggers with this declaration process records without respect to the running user sharing rules. This is a heuristic check - manual code review required to confirm.
Triggers with without sharing can read and modify any record via the trigger context, regardless of the running user permissions. A malicious or buggy trigger can expose all org data.
Add with sharing to triggers. Triggers run in user context and should respect sharing rules. If system-level access is genuinely required, use inherited sharing with a trusted calling context.
